feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
feed.subtitle: SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is there any purchasing units import API in SAP Ariba
entry.content: I want to import purchasing units data from third-party system to Ariba system. I know that we can use import purchasing units task to import csv file to Ariba through ITK, But i think ITK have some disadvantage.  I want to implement this business scenario through an API call. Do you have some best practices ?

entry.title: SAP-ARIBA -Vendors need to see only their payment terms
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently the selected vendors in SAP ARIBA can see the whole list of payment terms (which are required to derive payment methods) which belong to other vendors as well, it runs the risk of selecting the wrong one which belong to other vendors .  Currently multiple vendors payment terms have been configured in SAP ECC system.  If the selected vendors in  SAP ARIBA can see the payment terms which belong to them only, it could be a feasible solution. Can someone help how this can be achieved, if at all any configuration is missing or any development/enhancement is required.

Cheers

Sanjay

entry.title: SAP POs to Ariba B&I without Commerce Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I wanted to check if there is a way that we can send Purchase Orders Originated from SAP S/4 HANA to SAP Ariba B&I without Commerce Automation License? Has anyone done this? I am aware that with Commerce automation license we will be able to do a PO Copy from Network to SAP B&I for POs originating in S/4 or ECC.

We have SAP S/4 HANA where POs will be created, we don't have Commerce Automation license and we have SAP Ariba B&I Solution (Suite Integrated). We can't move our Ordering to Ariba B&I for some reason, but we would like the PO created in SAP S/4 to be available in Ariba B&I as a copy and at the same time if Network can send this PO to Supplier.

Please confirm if this is feasible at all if we have BTP license with us.

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Joule in Ariba Guided Buying: “Open in App” fails – sap.ushell.Container undefined, Fiori 3 CSS
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m seeing an issue with Joule “Open in App” in SAP Ariba Guided Buying and wanted to check if anyone has faced this before.

What I’m doing:
From Joule, I see a list of recent Purchase Requisitions. When I click Open in App on a PR, it should take me to the full Guided Buying PR screen.

What happens instead:
I get an error saying “The application could not be opened”, and nothing opens.

What I noticed while checking in browser tools:

  • Console shows messages like:

    • Unable to handle navigation with payload

    • No sap.ushell Container found

  • A CSS file does not load:
    /gb/sap_fiori_3_fonts.css
    This request returns 500 Internal Server Error and JSON instead of CSS.

    My questions:

    • Is this a known Guided Buying / Joule issue?

    • Does “Open in App” require any specific tenant or shell configuration?

    • Has anyone seen this issue and found a fix, or is raising an SAP ticket the only option?

      I have Added the screenshots in the following

       

    Any pointers would be really helpful.
    Thanks in advance!

entry.title: P Card Receiving
entry.content:
Some users in our institute have P cards, and they are allowed to buy materials for direct projects and we would like to track that spend and match it to the project. There are 2 problems:

1) the P Card charge only shows a total amount, and not the quantity ordered, so we have no way to receive against the quantity.

2) We are a government contractor, and on government projects we need to track the actual receipt date. We have to reconcile all items to pay the bill, but if the item is not received yet, the receipt defaults to the transaction date.

What is the best approach to address these issues?

entry.title: SAP ARIBA: GRN Receipt Number still showing in ariba business network even invoice is parked
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

I am facing an issue where the GRN receipt number is still showing in Ariba Business Network even when the invoice has been parked (the receipt number should have been consumed). The invoice status was rejected in the business network however it is parked in SAP.

SAP Ariba Contracts  SAP Ariba Invoicing SAP Ariba Sourcing SAP Ariba Sourcing

entry.title: Multiple Requisitions Upload - Ariba SAP
entry.content: looking for a way to upload Multiple Requisitions within Ariba SAP.  I have multiple I create to generate a Purchase Order. I do about 45-60 Uploads of requisitions a day. however, I don't see an option in Ariba that allows multiple files or bulk uploads.

entry.title: How can Ariba outbound web services directly export data from Ariba to an external system?
entry.content:
Hi experts,
 
I would like to know how to use Ariba outbound-type web services to directly export data from Ariba to an external system.
(outbound SOAP API)
I am working with the following service:
 
ServiceSheetAsyncExport / ServiceSheetRealTimeExport
 
I have already configured:
 
  • Integration Manager
  • End Point Configuration
  • Basic Authentication
 
My questions are:
 
  1. Can this Ariba outbound web service be called directly from an external system (SAP Integration Suite)?
  2. How does Ariba push data to the external endpoint?
 
Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: ME23N: PO Expected to Trigger Message Type NEUG but System Determines NEU.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing an issue in ME23N (Purchase Order display).

For a specific PO, the expected output type is NEUG, but the system is instead determining NEU.
I want to understand why NEUG is not getting picked and which logic/routine is overriding it.

I have already checked the basic setup:

  • Condition records exist for NEUG
  • NEUG is configured in NACE → EF (Purchasing)
  • Output type NEU also exists with the same access sequence
  • PO document type is correctly assigned

However, the system still picks NEU instead of NEUG.

Could you please guide me on what to debug and which objects or routines control the PO output determination?

Specifically:

  1. Where should I set breakpoints (FM or includes) to trace NEU/NEUG selection?
  2. Are there any exits/BAdIs (like MM06E005 or user routines in VOFM) that can override message determination?
  3. What should I check in the output access sequence or fields that could cause NEUG to be skipped?
  4. Any standard SAP recommendations for analyzing incorrect output type determination?

Any help or debugging steps would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to create custom fields to Central invoice Management / Ariba Invoicing
entry.content:
Hello there community, 

Regarding the Roadmap viewer, it should be able to create Custom Fields in SAP Ariba Invoicing and expose them to API. I want to fill a Custom field in CIM / Ariba Invoicing and send it to S/4 Hana public cloud Supplier invoice Custom field. 

SAP Road Map Explorer

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/aa935490094b441e9444ed74afba4d41.html

Apparently the Feature is "Delivered"

The Guide tells be to access a "Extensability Hub" . 

I dont have such a thing. Is there any information on how to add a custom field and how to expose this to API / Business Object in S4. 

 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Integration btw SAP SuccessFactors to SAP Ariba for user master data flow ..
entry.content:
need to Integrate  Success factors to SAP Ariba for  User master data integration as if the user is created in SF that can automatically be created in Ariba....what architecture we are thinking is  

Success Factors->SFTP->CPI->CIG->Ariba Buying/Sourcing.

Can anyone suggest will this work or not and if there is any other approach for the same requirement. and what actions mapping will be required from CIG, Ariba end for the requires integration.

entry.title: Ariba Approval date for custom forms report
entry.content: Is it possible to retrieve the approval date for each individual node in a custom form approval flow? I’ve checked the Forms and Extensions functionality, but it doesn’t seem to provide approval dates for every step in the exported CSV.

entry.title: Career with SAP S4/Hana- I have 7 years of experience in SAP ARIBA as Front end.
entry.content: Career with SAP S4/Hana- I have 7 years of experience in SAP ARIBA as Front end. I need proper guidance as to how to advance in a proper manner course difficulty wise. Need to grow myself here. Doubts I have like, should I go for S4 Hana and SAP Ariba, or S4 Hana or S4 Hana and Ariba and procurement and Sourcing. Please guide and help.

entry.title: ServiceNow being an external catalog for SAP Ariba Buying
entry.content:
Hi All!! 

Just wanted to ask if you ever met a scenario where ServiceNow catalog is an external catalog for SAP Ariba Buying?

Few words of explanation. 
A Customer implemented SAP Ariba Buying and now is asking about a scenario of looping in ServiceNow catalog where IT services / items PRs would be created and sent to SAP Ariba to underlay regular Ariba approvals WFs.

In my opinion having Guided Buying as an user front end there is no reason to start the process in ServiceNow - but there is a sine-qua-non condition - ServiceNow has to meet SAP Ariba requirements for being an external catalog.

I am aware of the requirements supplier catalog should meet to be published as an external one but in addition I am struggling with finding a green light / red light answer on if ServiceNow catalog meets this criteria.

I thought someone of you guys met such requirement earlier and knows the yes / no answer 🙂  

Before you ask - yes, I informed a Customer about such eventuality and yes, asked Customer to discuss it with ServiceNow 😉 Just thought our Community is quicker in answering 😉 

Thank you in advance. 
Marcin

entry.title: Integration of SAP Ariba Buying Procurement Expansion Pack (81Y) with Sourcing and Contracts Modules
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently exploring the SAP Ariba Buying Procurement Expansion Pack (scope 81Y) and would like to understand the integration workflows between its core modules.

Specifically, I have the following questions:

  1. Sourcing Integration: How does the Procurement Expansion Pack integrate with SAP Ariba Sourcing to initiate RFI and RFP processes from purchase requests created in SAP Ariba Buying?
  2. Contracts Integration: How does the solution connect with SAP Ariba Contracts for:
    • Contract creation linked to purchase requests?
    • Price updates flowing back to the original purchase request?
  3. End-to-End Workflow: What is the typical data flow and process sequence across these three modules?

Thanks!

entry.title: Joule functionality on Guided buying of Ariba
entry.content: When Guided Buying user would like to know the account code and/or commodity code in conjunction with their purchasing items , Could Joule (Generative AI) recommend user appropriate  organization specific account code and/or commodity code, to avoid asking  finance dept. or purchasing dept.

entry.title: Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network Upcoming Migration
entry.content: We have added new sub-accounts to the Ariba Cloud Connector. All connections are working perfectly in the new sub-accounts, however, the transaction traffic isn't visible. SAP has indicated a validity period until July 18th. Do we need to wait until July 18th for the data traffic to appear, or are further steps required?

entry.title: Differences between Ariba orders: Frame Work / Limit / Blanket.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Could you please explain the differences between Ariba Framework Orders, Limit Orders, and Blanket Purchase Orders?

In which scenarios / business cases would each one typically be used?

Thank you!

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing

entry.title: SES rejected in Ariba -is the supplier notified?
entry.content:
When a service entry sheet is created by the buyer directly in SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
(and not imported from ERP),

 if the buyer rejects the service entry sheet within Ariba,

does the supplier receive any notification (email or Network alert)? and if no notification is sent to the supplier, does the supplier see the status in SBN or SES status not visible to the supplier at all?

 My current understanding is:

• A buyer‑created service entry sheet is handled as a buyer‑side document.
• If it is rejected during the approval flow in Ariba, the status change is only visible to buyer users.
• Since the service entry sheet was never sent to the supplier on SAP Business Network, there is no automatic supplier notification triggered.

I tested this in a sandbox and observed the same behavior.
Since I couldn’t find official documentation explicitly stating this, I would like to confirm.
Can someone please confirm whether this understanding is correct for an Ariba‑native, buyer‑created service entry sheet scenario?

entry.title: Drafting Multiple PRs w/ Different Suppliers Simulteanously?
entry.content: As it's nearing fiscal year end, I want to draft some PRs and keep them in composing status while I'm working on getting some additional information. However, it keeps the item in my cart and won't allow me to issue another PR with a different supplier. I have tried submitting and withdrawing, but withdrawing just puts it back in my cart and I have the same issue. Is there a workaround? Could just be limited to what our version is (custom-built for state government).
